ORDR.description: Sales Order Header representing customer purchase intent before fulfillment
ORDR.business_meaning: order pipeline, demand planning, future sales, not actual revenue
ORDR.embedding_text: sales order customer order pipeline pending order future sales not revenue booking data order count how many orders orders today orders this week

columns.DocStatus: order status O for Open and C for closed

OINV.description: Invoice table representing finalized sales transactions
OINV.business_meaning: actual sales, revenue, completed transactions, invoice count by date
OINV.embedding_text: sales revenue invoice billing total sales final transaction customer sales income invoice count today daily invoices number of invoices how many invoices current date invoice date filter

columns.DocDate: invoice date used for date filtering today this week this month
columns.DocStatus: order status O for Open and C for closed

RDR1.business_meaning: item level order data, quantity ordered per product
RDR1.embedding_text: order items quantity ordered product order details line items order product breakdown

INV1.business_meaning: item level sales data, quantity sold per product
INV1.embedding_text: sold items sales quantity product revenue item sales invoice line items sold quantity per product
